name: Smalto Holding SA
summary: Smalto Holding SA designs and sells men's apparel and accessories. The company men's apparel includes shirts, costumes, coats, trousers, sweaters, T-shirt and polos, and jackets; and accessories comprise cufflinks, belts, shoes, gloves, glasses, and suitcases. Smalto Holding SA was formerly known as DS Holding SA and changed its name to Smalto Holding SA in May 2009. The company is based in Paris, France.
